arguments.task: Visit Copper's official website and official developer/documentation/support pages. Find authoritative evidence for: 1) what Copper is in one line, 2) whether Copper has a public API and what type it is, 3) authentication methods for the API, 4) pricing/access requirements for API use if any, 5) rate limit information, and 6) whether there is an official or clearly existing MCP server/integration page. Prioritize first-party pages such as developer docs, support docs, pricing pages, changelog, or official GitHub. Return the exact page URLs and short extracted findings with quotes if available.

input.thought: Start browser research on official Copper sources.

raw_result.description: Copper is a CRM platform built for Google Workspace teams to manage sales relationships and workflows.
raw_result.auth_notes: Copper developer docs indicate authentication via API keys and OAuth 2.0.
raw_result.gating_reason: Copper's pricing page shows 'API & Embedded integration SDK' available on higher paid plans (evidence gathered indicates Professional and Business, not Basic), so API access is not available on the lowest/self-serve free tier.

api_surface.breadth: Public developer documentation shows a RESTful JSON API with getting started, authentication, requests/responses, and resource endpoints for CRM data and bulk APIs.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official MCP server or first-party MCP page was verified from the gathered evidence. This is an absence-of-evidence conclusion and should be human-checked if MCP availability is critical.

raw_result.blocker: Requires a qualifying paid Copper plan for API access; MCP availability was not verified from first-party evidence.
raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Gathered evidence indicates API requests are limited to 180 requests per minute, and bulk APIs are limited to 3 requests per second. Exact wording/source section should be human-verified on the requests documentation page.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official public developer portal exists; docs explicitly mention RESTful JSON API plus both API key and OAuth 2.0 auth. Pricing page includes a named 'API & Embedded integration SDK' feature, indicating productized API access on paid tiers.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Some details were extracted indirectly through browser-task observations rather than directly quoted in-chat: exact one-line product wording, exact paid-plan mapping for API access, exact rate-limit wording/location, and absence of any MCP page. These fields should be verified manually from the cited first-party pages.
